tickets.subject: DeskAgent crashes when processing large PDFs
tickets.description: When trying to process a PDF with more than 100 pages, DeskAgent crashes with an out-of-memory error. This started happening after the last update.

tickets.subject: How to configure MCP servers for Gmail?
tickets.description: I'm trying to set up the Gmail MCP server but the OAuth2 authentication is not working. I've followed the documentation but keep getting an 'invalid_grant' error.

tickets.subject: Feature Request: Dark mode for WebUI
tickets.description: It would be great to have a dark mode option for the DeskAgent WebUI. The current light theme is too bright for evening work.

response_json.subject: DeskAgent crashes when processing large PDFs
response_json.description:
When trying to process a PDF with more than 100 pages, DeskAgent crashes with an out-of-memory error. This started happening after the last update.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Open DeskAgent
2. Select a PDF with 100+ pages
3. Run any agent that processes the PDF

Expected: PDF should be processed
Actual: Application crashes with OOM error

System: Windows 11, 16GB RAM, DeskAgent v0.6.1
